coverage.desc: savant.ip≥30 AND k_pct≥0.28 — full Statcast, ML overlay active, tight tail
savant.ip≥30 AND k_pct≤0.19 — control pitcher, wider tail
savant.ip≥30 AND k_pct ∈ (0.19, 0.28) — median archetype, default r=30
savant null OR savant.ip<5 — formula path forced (no ML overlay)
savant null AND career not null — career-anchor branch
model_input.opp_kpct_source begins with 'lineup' — slot-weighted opp K%
L5 regression cap fired (rawK9 from logs > careerK9 × 1.25)
